SELECT a.ShippingState AS state, DATE_TRUNC('quarter', c.closeddate) AS quarter, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) / 86400.0) AS avg_closure_days
FROM "Case" c
JOIN core_crm.Account a ON c.accountid = a.Id
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.closeddate >= (DATE '2022-10-26' - INTERVAL '6 quarters')
GROUP BY state, quarter
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
ORDER BY avg_closure_days ASC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT a.ShippingState AS state, DATE_TRUNC('quarter', c.closeddate) AS quarter, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) / 86400.0) AS avg_closure_days
FROM "Case" c
JOIN core_crm.Account a ON c.accountid = a.Id
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.closeddate >= (DATE '2022-10-26' - INTERVAL '6 quarters')
GROUP BY state, quarter
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
ORDER BY avg_closure_days ASC
LIMIT 10;

args.code:
import pandas as pd, json
cases = pd.DataFrame(var_call_VZic54R0Zc0zhYAeWe4EyjqN)
accounts = pd.DataFrame(var_call_n27fz2Ludm70vrhB8ScQcBN2)

for df in (cases, accounts):
    for col in df.columns:
        if df[col].dtype == 'object':
            df[col] = df[col].str.strip()

accounts['clean_id'] = accounts['Id'].str.lstrip('#')
cases['clean_accountid'] = cases['accountid'].str.lstrip('#')

merged = cases.merge(accounts[['clean_id','ShippingState']], left_on='clean_accountid', right_on='clean_id', how='left')

merged['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(merged['createddate'])
merged['closeddate'] = pd.to_datetime(merged['closeddate'])

cutoff = pd.Timestamp('2022-10-26') - pd.DateOffset(months=18)
merged_recent = merged[merged['closeddate'] >= cutoff]

merged_recent['closure_days'] = (merged_recent['closeddate'] - merged_recent['createddate']).dt.total_seconds() / 86400.0

merged_recent['quarter'] = merged_recent['closeddate'].dt.to_period('Q')

agg = merged_recent.groupby(['ShippingState','quarter']).agg(case_count=('closure_days','size'), avg_closure_days=('closure_days','mean')).reset_index()

agg_filtered = agg[agg['case_count'] >= 3]

if agg_filtered.empty:
    result_state = None
else:
    state_perf = agg_filtered.groupby('ShippingState').agg(weighted_avg=('avg_closure_days','mean')).reset_index()
    result_state = state_perf.sort_values('weighted_avg').iloc[0]['ShippingState']

out = json.dumps(result_state)
print('__RESULT__:')
print(out)

import pandas as pd, json
cases = pd.DataFrame(var_call_VZic54R0Zc0zhYAeWe4EyjqN)
accounts = pd.DataFrame(var_call_n27fz2Ludm70vrhB8ScQcBN2)

for df in (cases, accounts):
    for col in df.columns:
        if df[col].dtype == 'object':
            df[col] = df[col].str.strip()

accounts['clean_id'] = accounts['Id'].str.lstrip('#')
cases['clean_accountid'] = cases['accountid'].str.lstrip('#')

merged = cases.merge(accounts[['clean_id','ShippingState']], left_on='clean_accountid', right_on='clean_id', how='left')

merged['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(merged['createddate'], utc=True)
merged['closeddate'] = pd.to_datetime(merged['closeddate'], utc=True)

cutoff = pd.Timestamp('2022-10-26', tz='UTC') - pd.DateOffset(months=18)
merged_recent = merged[merged['closeddate'] >= cutoff]

merged_recent['closure_days'] = (merged_recent['closeddate'] - merged_recent['createddate']).dt.total_seconds() / 86400.0

merged_recent['quarter'] = merged_recent['closeddate'].dt.to_period('Q')

agg = merged_recent.groupby(['ShippingState','quarter']).agg(case_count=('closure_days','size'), avg_closure_days=('closure_days','mean')).reset_index()

agg_filtered = agg[agg['case_count'] >= 3]

if agg_filtered.empty:
    result_state = None
else:
    state_perf = agg_filtered.groupby('ShippingState').agg(weighted_avg=('avg_closure_days','mean')).reset_index()
    result_state = state_perf.sort_values('weighted_avg').iloc[0]['ShippingState']

out = json.dumps(result_state)
print('__RESULT__:')
print(out)

merged['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(merged['createddate'], utc=True)
merged['closeddate'] = pd.to_datetime(merged['closeddate'], utc=True)
